content.problemStatement:
**This is the easy version of the problem. Here, there are no queries.**

Given 222 arrays AAA and BBB, both of length NNN, define f(A,B)f(A, B)f(A,B) as follows:


Choose 222 intervals [L1,R1][L_1, R_1][L1‚Äč,R1‚Äč], [L2,R2][L_2, R_2][L2‚Äč,R2‚Äč] such that:

1‚Č§Li‚Č§Ri‚Č§N1 \le L_i \le R_i \le N1‚Č§Li‚Äč‚Č§Ri‚Äč‚Č§N
[L1,R1]‚ą©[L2,R2][L_1, R_1] \cap [L_2, R_2][L1‚Äč,R1‚Äč]‚ą©[L2‚Äč,R2‚Äč] is non-empty, i.e. they share at least one point.


The score of this choice of intervals is defined as ‚ąĎi=L1R1Ai+‚ąĎi=L2R2Bi\displaystyle\sum_{i = L_1}^{R_1} A_i + \displaystyle\sum_{i = L_2}^{R_2} B_ii=L1‚Äč‚ąĎR1‚Äč‚ÄčAi‚Äč+i=L2‚Äč‚ąĎR2‚Äč‚ÄčBi‚Äč.
f(L,R)f(L, R)f(L,R) is defined as the maximum possible score under the above constraints.
Less formally, you have to choose intersecting subarrays from AAA and BBB, and maximize the total sum of the subarrays.

You are given 222 arrays AAA and BBB of length NNN. Find f(A,B)f(A, B)f(A,B).


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of three lines of input.

The first line contains a single integer NNN - the size of the arrays.
The second line contains NNN integers - A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
The third line contains NNN integers - B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BNB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_NB1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,BN‚Äč.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the answer f(A,B)f(A, B)f(A,B).
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 2‚čÖ1052 \cdot 10^52‚čÖ105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: We can choose [L1,R1]=[1,2][L_1, R_1] = [1, 2][L1‚Äč,R1‚Äč]=[1,2] and [L2,R2]=[2,3][L_2, R_2] = [2, 3][L2‚Äč,R2‚Äč]=[2,3], and the score is 1+3+3+1=81 + 3 + 3 + 1 = 81+3+3+1=8.
Test case 222: We can choose [L1,R1]=[1,2][L_1, R_1] = [1, 2][L1‚Äč,R1‚Äč]=[1,2] and [L2,R2]=[2,2][L_2, R_2] = [2, 2][L2‚Äč,R2‚Äč]=[2,2] and the score is 2‚ąí1+2=32 - 1 + 2 = 32‚ąí1+2=3. We cannot choose [L1,R1]=[1,1][L_1, R_1] = [1, 1][L1‚Äč,R1‚Äč]=[1,1] and [L2,R2]=[2,2][L_2, R_2] = [2, 2][L2‚Äč,R2‚Äč]=[2,2] because there is no intersection.
